name: project-knowledge
description: Load project architecture and structure knowledge. Use when you need to understand how this project is organized.
capabilities: Access common code patterns from memory/knowledge/codebase/patterns.json
Retrieve known gotchas and pitfalls from memory/knowledge/codebase/gotchas.json
Follow structured format for knowledge updates after discoveries
Merge new knowledge updates after task completion
author: Clouder0
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill with no executable code. Only permits the Read tool to access knowledge files. No network, file writing, or code execution capabilities. All 15 static findings are false positives triggered by benign JSON field names and documentation strings that do not represent actual security risks.
valueStatement: AI assistants often lack context about project structure and conventions. This skill provides organized access to architecture, patterns, and gotchas so assistants understand how components connect and follow established practices.
limitations: Only reads knowledge files, does not create or modify them directly
Depends on existing knowledge files being present in memory/knowledge/codebase/
Cannot access project files outside the knowledge directory
Knowledge updates are merged only after task completion, not in real-time

useCases.title: Quick project onboarding
useCases.description: New team members understand project structure and coding standards quickly through organized knowledge files.

useCases.title: Better context for AI
useCases.description: AI assistants gain project-specific context to provide more accurate and relevant code suggestions.

useCases.title: Consistent design choices
useCases.description: Team members reference established patterns when making architectural decisions to maintain consistency.

promptTemplates.title: Load architecture
promptTemplates.prompt: Load the project architecture knowledge file to understand how this project is structured.

promptTemplates.title: Check conventions
promptTemplates.prompt: What coding conventions should I follow for this project? Load the conventions file.

promptTemplates.title: Find patterns
promptTemplates.prompt: What patterns are used in this codebase? Show me the patterns file.

promptTemplates.title: Avoid pitfalls
promptTemplates.prompt: What gotchas should I be aware of in this project? Load the gotchas knowledge file.

bestPractices: Load relevant knowledge files before starting tasks to understand project context
Update knowledge files when discovering new patterns, conventions, or gotchas
Use the structured JSON format for knowledge_updates with appropriate confidence levels
antiPatterns: Starting work without loading relevant knowledge files
Failing to document discovered gotchas for future reference

faq.question: What tools does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports Claude, Codex, and Claude Code AI assistants.

faq.question: What is the maximum file size for knowledge files?
faq.answer: Knowledge files have no strict size limit but should remain focused for quick loading.

faq.question: How does this integrate with existing workflows?
faq.answer: Load knowledge files at the start of tasks using the Read tool with the @memory/knowledge path.

faq.question: Is my project data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only reads files you explicitly specify. No data is sent externally.

faq.question: Why are my updates not visible immediately?
faq.answer: Knowledge updates are merged after task completion to maintain consistency across sessions.

faq.question: How is this different from general documentation?
faq.answer: This skill provides AI-specific, structured knowledge formatted for optimal assistant understanding and action.
